title: Perplexity Node credential test fails
symptom: The credential test for the Perplexity node fails with 'Couldn’t connect with these settings', but the node executes successfully during workflow execution.
root_cause: This issue arises from a bug in the Perplexity node's credential test functionality. The test fetch may not handle the API key correctly, leading to a misleading failure message despite the node functioning properly during actual executions.
fix_steps: Ignore the credential test failure message
Continue using the Perplexity node as it works during execution
agent_instruction: Proceed with using the Perplexity node despite the credential test failure.
